1/// Adds two numbers. 1/// Adds two numbers, saturating on overflow. 2pub fn add(a: i32, b: i32) -> i32 { 2pub fn add(a: i32, b: i32) -> i32 { 3 a + b 3 a.saturating_add(b) 4} 5 6#[cfg(test)] 7mod tests { 8 use super::*; 910 #[test]11 fn saturates() {12 assert_eq!(add(i32::MAX, 1), i32::MAX);13 } 4}14}
